barcodeManagement.activeHelp: Inactive definitions are not used by runtime resolve.
barcodeManagement.erpFallbackHelp: When pattern parsing is not enough, resolve continues on WMS mirror stock and variant fields.
barcodeManagement.testDescription: Test the barcode through the backend resolve service for the selected module.

guidance.title: Business Rule
guidance.sameDayRule: If the same plate arrives again on the same day, no new record is created; the existing record is updated.
guidance.nextDayRule: If the same plate arrives on a different day, the system records it as a new entry.

ocrGoodsReceiptMatch.title: OCR Customer Stock Match Form
ocrGoodsReceiptMatch.description: Match the stock code used by the customer on the dispatch note with our stock card. OCR lines will be converted through this definition later.

guidance.title: Business Rule
guidance.line1: The same customer stock code can only be defined once for the same customer.
guidance.line2: This screen does not perform OCR; it only manages the mapping between customer stock codes and our stock cards.

form.allowLessQuantity: Allow Less Quantity Based On Order
form.allowLessQuantityDescription: Allows entering less quantity than the order. When this option is active, quantities less than the order quantity can be entered.
form.allowMoreQuantity: Allow More Quantity Based On Order
form.allowMoreQuantityDescription: Allows entering more quantity than the order. When this option is active, quantities more than the order quantity can be entered.
form.requireApprovalDescription: Requires approval before sending to ERP system. When this option is active, transactions go through an approval process before being sent to ERP.
form.requireAllOrderItemsCollectedDescription: When this parameter is active, all items in the order must be collected.
form.editDescription: You can edit existing parameter settings

approval.rejectError: Production plan could not be rejected

detail.title: Production Detail
detail.subtitle: Review the plan, orders, dependencies, and linked transfers in a management view.
detail.error: Production detail could not be loaded.
detail.statusInfoDraft: This plan is still in draft. If it has not been processed on the floor, you can go back to edit mode and update it.
detail.statusInfoLocked: This plan may already be in operational flow. For that reason this detail screen stays read-only and editing remains locked.
detail.ordersSubtitle: Review order, quantity, assignment, and actual summary in one place.
detail.orderVarianceSubtitle: Track output and consumption planned-vs-actual gaps for each order.
detail.orderTransferBreakdownSubtitle: Review production transfers linked to each order separately.
detail.statusInfoNoUpdate: You can view this plan, but you cannot switch to edit mode because you do not have production update permission.
detail.noOrderTransfer: There is no transfer linked to this order.
detail.noPlanTransfer: There is no transfer linked to this plan.

create.title: Create Production Plan
create.subtitle: You can start quickly from a work order or stock information, then complete the plan normally on this screen.
create.editSubtitle: Only draft plans with no shopfloor activity can be updated here.
create.erpLoaded: Quick entry applied. Main product, variant, and quantity fields were filled.
create.error: Production plan could not be saved
create.editModeBody: This plan has already been saved and you are updating it here. When you save, the system updates the existing draft plan instead of creating a new one.

validation.outputOrder: An output row has no linked order.
validation.consumptionOrder: A consumption row has no linked order.

source.title: Quick entry
source.subtitle: Fill the basic fields from a work order or stock information, then complete the rest of the plan here.

create.modeManualDescription: You define every order, output, and consumption breakdown. ERP may still be used as reference.

erp.fetchByWorkOrderDescription: If a work order already exists, enter it here. The system fills the main product, variant, and key planning fields in Step 1.
erp.fetchByStockDescription: If no work order exists yet, choose the main product, optional variant, and quantity. The system fills Step 1 based on stock information.

erpNote.title: Quick entry is only the start
erpNote.body: The fetched information fills Step 1 and, when available, the initial plan draft. Final review and saving still happen on this screen.

readiness.title: Save readiness
readiness.subtitle: See what is missing before you save the plan.
readiness.ready: Core fields look ready. Review details, then save.

header.title: Plan header
header.subtitle: These fields map to the production plan header (PR_HEADER).

headerAssignments.title: Plan assignments
headerAssignments.subtitle: Assign team, role, or primary owner at PR_HEADER_ASSIGNMENT level.
headerAssignments.empty: Header assignments are optional but recommended to clarify shopfloor ownership.

orders.title: Production orders
orders.subtitle: Manage PR_ORDER records per order. Each order owns its outputs, consumption, and dependencies.

planner.dragReorderHint: Drag the handle on the left and drop on another card to update flow numbers and rebuild dependencies for the current execution mode. (No links in parallel mode.)

steps.headerDesc: Ne uretecegini ve kac adet olacagini belirle
steps.materialsDesc: Her asama icin ne uretilip ne tuketilecegini yaz
steps.flowDesc: Seri, paralel ve sorumlu dagilimini netlestir

planner.title: Uretim Planlama Akisi
planner.subtitle: Planlamacinin once urunu, sonra asamalari, en son akis ve sorumlulari kurmasi icin sade akisi takip edin.
planner.stepReadyBody: Zorunlu alanlar dolu. Isterseniz bir sonraki adıma gecebilirsiniz.

header.title: Ne Uretecegiz?
header.subtitle: Planin ana urununu, miktarini ve kaynagini secin.
header.side: Planin dogru kurulmasi icin ilk kontrol noktalari.

planner.serialHint: Seri modda bir asama bitmeden sonraki asama baslamaz.
planner.parallelHint: Paralel modda asamalar ayni anda ilerleyebilir.
planner.hybridHint: Karma modda bazi asamalar ayni anda, bazi asamalar sirayla ilerler.

stageTemplates.title: Hazir Asama Kurgulari
stageTemplates.subtitle: Planlamaciya hiz kazandirmak icin hazir iskeletler sunuyoruz. Gerekirse sonra duzenlenir.

planner.ordersGuide: Her kart tek bir uretim asamasidir. Planlamaci bu kartlari asama mantigiyla doldurur.
planner.stageCardHint: Asamanin urunu, miktari ve akistaki yeri burada belirlenir.
planner.stageSimpleBody: Asama tipi secin, bu asamanin ne uretecegini yazin, sonra da once mi ayni anda mi yoksa sonra mi ilerleyecegini secin. Sistem teknik baglantiyi arka planda kurar.
planner.stageReadyBody: Asama adi, uretilecek stok ve miktar tamam. Isterseniz bir sonraki asamaya gecebilirsiniz.
planner.outputsGuide: Her asamanin ne uretecegini planlayin. Gerekirse ayni asamaya birden fazla cikti ekleyebilirsiniz.
planner.consumptionsGuide: Her asamanin ne tuketecegini planlayin. Gercekte kullanilan seri daha sonra operasyon sirasinda secilir.
planner.flowGuide: Planlamaci asamalarin sirayla mi ayni anda mi ilerleyecegini burada kontrol eder. Sistem isterseniz baglantilari otomatik kurar.
planner.flowEmpty: Henuz asamalar arasi baglanti kurulmamıs. Seri veya karma planlarda otomatik akis kur butonunu kullanin.
planner.headerAssignmentGuide: Plani yonetecek ana ekip veya sorumluyu burada belirleyin.
planner.orderAssignmentGuide: Her asama farkli operatore veya role atanabilir.

create.canStartManuallyHint: Operator can start the order before dependencies complete.
create.autoStartHint: Let ERP or shopfloor open the next step automatically.

orderAssignments.title: Order assignments
orderAssignments.subtitle: Define who owns this order on the shopfloor.
orderAssignments.empty: No assignment rows for this order.

outputs.title: Planned outputs
outputs.subtitle: PR_ORDER_OUTPUT defines what each order will produce.

consumptions.title: Planned consumption
consumptions.subtitle: PR_ORDER_CONSUMPTION lines; operators can enter actual serial/lot later.

dependencies.title: Order dependencies
dependencies.subtitle: Define when an order may start in serial, parallel, or hybrid flow. Add transfer completion rules if needed.
dependencies.empty: No dependencies yet. Leave empty for parallel flow or link orders for serial flow.

create.permissionInfoCreate: You need production create permission to save this plan.
create.permissionInfoUpdate: You need production update permission to update this plan.
create.mainOrderNoPlaceholder: Is emri no ile alanlari doldurun

info.overviewBody: Bu ekran once ana urunu ve miktari secmenizi, sonra uretimi asamalara bolmenizi, en son da hangi asamanin once veya ayni anda ilerleyecegini belirlemenizi saglar. Kayit aninda sistem plani uretim emirlerine cevirir.
info.headerBody: Ana urun, planin sonunda elde etmek istediginiz mamuldur. Ana yapkod bu mamulun varyantini anlatir. Hazir bir is emri veya stok bilgisi varsa hizli giris ile bu alanlari otomatik doldurabilirsiniz.
info.stageBody: Her kart tek bir uretim asamasidir. Ornek: govde hazirlama, montaj, paketleme. Seri modda bir asama bitmeden sonraki baslamaz. Paralel veya karma modda ayni sequence numarasina sahip asamalar birlikte ilerleyebilir.
info.outputBody: Cikti, ilgili asama sonunda elde edilen urundur. Ara mamul olabilir, nihai mamul olabilir. Burada planlanan miktar yazilir; gercekte ne kadar uretildigi process ekraninda kaydedilir.
info.consumptionBody: Tuketim, bu asamayi tamamlamak icin gereken malzemedir. Planlama ekraninda neyin gerekli oldugu yazilir. Hangi seri veya lotun kullanildigi ise daha sonra operator tarafinda process ekraninda girilir veya ERP/Netsis tarafindan dogrulanir.
info.flowBody: Akis, hangi asamanin once bitecegini ve hangisinin onu bekleyecegini belirler. Bu alan sayesinde birlestirme veya son montaj gibi asamalar, gerekli onceki asamalar bitmeden baslatilmaz.

guide.title: Transfer Rehberi
guide.subtitle: Bu ekran PT tarafinda hangi rol ile neden acildigini netlestirir.
guide.materialSupplyBody: Uretim tuketimi icin gerekli hammaddeleri besleme alanina cekmek icin kullanilir.
guide.semiFinishedMoveBody: Bir emrin ciktisini sonraki emrin tuketimine veya istasyonuna tasir.
guide.outputMoveBody: Tamamlanan urunun uretimden mamul depoya cikisini yonetir.

info.overviewBody: Bu ekran, uretim planindaki bir asamaya malzeme beslemek, ara mamulu sonraki istasyona tasimak veya tamamlanan urunu mamul depoya almak icin transfer emri olusturur. Oneri paneli, secili plan veya emrin ihtiyacindan otomatik satir uretir.
info.linkBody: Plan veya emir baglantisi kuruldugunda sistem, bu transferin hangi uretim ihtiyacini karşıladığını bilir. Boylece hangi tuketim satirinin beslendigi veya hangi ciktinin tasindigi izlenebilir olur.
info.linesBody: Once onerileri getirerek sistemin uretim ihtiyacindan tavsiye uretmesini saglayin. Sonra gerekli satirlari secip mevcut taslaga ekleyin veya degistirin. Bu ekran planlamaciya malzeme besleme ve ara istasyon hareketlerini kontrollu kurdurmak icin tasarlandi.

countTypeDescriptions.general: Counts all active stock in one order. This is the easiest path for an opening count.
countTypeDescriptions.warehouse: Counts stocks in a single warehouse. Use it for warehouse-based counting.
countTypeDescriptions.stock: Counts a specific stock code. Suitable for problematic or critical items.
countTypeDescriptions.rack: Counts a specific rack area. Useful for rack cleanup and verification.
countTypeDescriptions.cell: Counts a single cell. This is the fastest local control method.
countTypeDescriptions.combined: Combines multiple warehouses, stocks, or racks in one count order.

validation.warehouseRequired: A warehouse must be selected for warehouse count.

validation.rackRequired: A rack code must be entered for rack count.
validation.cellRequired: A cell code must be entered for cell count.
validation.scopeRequired: At least one scope row must be added for combined count.
validation.validScopeRequired: At least one valid scope row must be filled for combined count.

summary.general: All active stock will be included in the count list

employee.user: This links the PPE card to a system user. First name and last name are filled from the selected user.
employee.customer: Select the customer/company the employee belongs to. This is shown on documents and reports.
employee.employeeCode: Enter the internal personnel or registry code used to identify the employee.
employee.department: Select the employee's department. The role list is filtered by this selection.
employee.role: Select the employee's actual role definition. PPE entitlement is calculated from role plus group code.
employee.employmentStartDate: Initial and 3-month entitlements are calculated from this date. A wrong date means a wrong entitlement result.
employee.qrCode: Unique QR value scanned in the field to select the employee quickly.

matrix.department: Select the department this entitlement rule belongs to.
matrix.role: Select the role definition the entitlement belongs to. The system always resolves entitlement by role and group code.
matrix.groupCode: The main key of this screen is the group code. Entitlement matching runs by group, not by stock code. Different stocks in the same group share the same rule; if a stock code exists, treat it as informational only.
matrix.initialQuantity: Total quantity the employee can receive for this group when first joining.
matrix.initialFrequencyDays: Frequency controls whether the entitlement is taken all at once or in parts. If you enter 30, the employee must wait at least 30 days after one issue before another issue from the same entitlement. Leave empty if no day-gap rule is needed.
matrix.initialBulk: When enabled, the employee may receive the full initial entitlement in one issue. When disabled, the system forces partial usage and applies the frequency-day rule if defined.
matrix.initialFrequencyQuantity: Maximum quantity allowed in one issue or in each frequency window. Example: if total entitlement is 3 and frequency quantity is 1, the employee can receive at most 1 item each time.
matrix.threeMonthQuantity: Extra entitlement that becomes available 3 months after employment start.
matrix.threeMonthFrequencyDays: If the 3-month entitlement will be used in parts, this defines how many days must pass between issues.
matrix.threeMonthBulk: When enabled, the full 3-month entitlement can be taken in one issue. Otherwise the system allows only partial usage.
matrix.threeMonthFrequencyQuantity: If the 3-month entitlement is used in parts, this defines the maximum quantity per issue.
matrix.routineQuantity: Standard quantity granted again in every recurring period after the initial and 3-month phases are completed.
matrix.routinePeriodType: Defines the time unit used to renew the recurring entitlement. Usually day, month, or year.
matrix.routinePeriodInterval: Defines how often the recurring entitlement renews. Example: year + 1 means every year; day + 30 means every 30 days.
matrix.routineFrequencyDays: If the recurring entitlement is used in parts, this defines how many days must pass between issues.
matrix.routineBulk: When enabled, the full recurring entitlement can be taken in one issue. Otherwise the system enforces partial usage.
matrix.routineFrequencyQuantity: If recurring entitlement is used in parts, this defines the maximum quantity per issue.
matrix.isActive: Inactive rows are ignored by entitlement calculation.
matrix.isMandatory: Enable this if the group is mandatory for occupational safety; it can be used in controls and reporting.

columns.initialFrequencyDays: Initial wait days before next issue
columns.threeMonthFrequencyDays: 3rd month wait days before next issue
columns.routineFrequencyDays: Routine wait days before next issue

dist.reasonMissingOpenOrder: This stock does not exist on an open PPE order for the selected warehouse.
dist.reasonExceedsOpenOrder: Quantity exceeds the open order amount for the selected warehouse. Max: {{max}}.
dist.reasonWaitEntitlement: Waiting for entitlement result. Try again after barcode resolution completes.
dist.reasonLineNotAllowed: This stock cannot be added under the current entitlement and open-order rules.
dist.stockSavedNote: This stock code is written to the line as entered: {{code}}
dist.openOrderIssueSummary: This line can be issued because the customer has an open PPE order even though no entitlement is available.
dist.groupEntSummary: Entitlements in this group: initial {{a}}, 3M {{b}}, routine {{c}}, total {{total}}.
dist.lineOpenOrderOnly: Issued only because of the customer's open PPE order.
dist.initialPromptTitle: Has the initial entry order been opened?
dist.initialPromptDesc: This employee still has initial-entry entitlement. If the initial-entry order has not been opened yet, continue in the initial order screen first.

reports.pickRowRole: Select a role on the left to see the summary.
reports.pickRowDept: Select a department on the left to see the summary.
reports.pickRowGroup: Select a group on the left to see the summary.

validationLog.searchPh: Search employee, stock, group, or error code
validationLog.pickLog: Select a log entry on the left to see details.

matrix.intro: This screen defines entitlements by group code; stock code is not the main decision field here. The employee first uses the initial entitlement, then the 3-month entitlement, and afterwards the recurring entitlement.
matrix.touchGuideTitle: Very simple explanation for tablet and phone users
matrix.touchGuideLine1: Total entitlement means how many items this person can receive in that phase overall.
matrix.touchGuideLine2: Wait days before next issue means how many days the person must wait after taking one item before taking again.
matrix.touchGuideLine3: Max quantity per issue means how many items can be given in one visit at most.
matrix.lblInitialFreqDays: Initial wait days before next issue
matrix.lblRoutineFreqDays: Routine wait days before next issue
matrix.hintInitialFreqDays: Example: if you enter 30, someone who receives today must wait 30 days before taking from the same entitlement again.
matrix.hintInitialFreqQty: Example: if you enter 1, the user can receive at most 1 item in one visit.
matrix.hintThreeMonthFreqDays: Enter how many days must pass between issues for the 3-month entitlement.
matrix.hintThreeMonthFreqQty: Enter the highest quantity that can be issued in one visit for the 3-month entitlement.
matrix.hintRoutineFreqDays: Enter how many days must pass before the recurring entitlement can be issued again.
matrix.hintRoutineFreqQty: Enter the highest quantity that can be issued in one visit for the recurring entitlement.

placement.description: Place invoiced sheets to a yard or cell. Stack order is required for stacked storage.

placement.presetBesideDesc: Places on the same row at the next free position to the right of the current plate. Suitable for side-by-side layouts.
placement.presetBehindDesc: Moves one row deeper in the same column logic. Use for deep yard placement scenarios.
placement.presetAboveDesc: Stacks on top of the same position. System suggests the next stack order automatically.
placement.quickSuggestDesc: Suggest position beside, behind, or above existing plates with one click.
placement.noOccupancyHelp: No placed plate exists in this location yet. For the first plate, enter row/position manually or check empty areas in 2D/3D view.

inspection.title: Yard acceptance inspection
inspection.description: Search by plate or serial, then record arrived/approved/rejected and partial acceptance.
inspection.noHit: No matching record for this search.
inspection.approveDesc: If the plate arrived and is suitable in quality/documents, approve it. Only approved quantity proceeds to the next step.
inspection.rejectDesc: If plate arrived but is not suitable, reject it. Rejection reason is mandatory when rejected quantity exists.
inspection.partialDesc: If the plate did not arrive, mark as missing. For partial arrivals, record arrived, approved and rejected quantities separately.
inspection.batchSearchPh: Enter excel record no or export ref no
inspection.pickSeriesSubtitle: Filter by status, then pick the series to inspect.

inspection.pickFlowHelp: First select the relevant Excel batch, then select the plate series you want to inspect.
